deadlines.title: DSA Assignment 3 - Binary Trees & AVL Trees
deadlines.subject: Data Structures & Algorithms
deadlines.description: Implement AVL tree with insertion, deletion, and all traversals. Submit code + handwritten complexity analysis on Moodle before 11:59 PM. Late submission: -20% per day.

deadlines.title: CN Lab Report 2 - Socket Programming
deadlines.subject: Computer Networks
deadlines.description: Submit lab report with TCP/UDP client-server code, output screenshots, and viva questions. Email to prof.singh@nitb.ac.in with subject 'CN-Lab2-RollNo'.

deadlines.title: Mathematics III Tutorial Sheet 3
deadlines.subject: Mathematics III
deadlines.description: Solve all problems from Tutorial Sheet 3 (Laplace Transforms). Submit handwritten solutions in class. No late submissions accepted.

deadlines.title: Digital Electronics Mini Project Proposal
deadlines.subject: Digital Electronics
deadlines.description: Submit 2-page project proposal with block diagram, component list, and timeline. Team of 2. Topics assigned in lab.

deadlines.title: TCS NQT Practice Test
deadlines.subject: Placement Prep
deadlines.description: Complete the mock aptitude test on TCS iON portal. Minimum 60% required for shortlisting. Link shared on placement WhatsApp group.
